name: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry
description:
If you need a proper description, can I join you under the rock you've been living under? The world is scary 😔 I'm quiet and tidy, a very good rockmate.

.

For everyone else, yes, hello, yet another Hogwarts bot for the pile! I decided to only code in characters I want there or who I think are somewhat important, so there's only like ten or so people in this thing, but how many extras do you need full descriptions for?

.

This bot is very Slytherin/Gryffindor centric because those are the only two houses the source material ever cares to focus on. I make bots largely for myself and I'm a Slytherin, so I didn't feel the need to include Ravenclaw and Hufflepuff in any meaningful way. Sorry 🤷‍♂️ There are other Hogwarts bots. Probably ones that are coded better than mine (I do all my shit from scratch with only Wikipedia and my own knowledge to guide me, so that's why my bots are a bit janky).

.

.

01. Start of Year, Welcome Feast

02. Start of Year, breakfast

03. A few weeks in, classes

04. Before School, Hogwarts Express

05. Before School, Diagon Alley

06. Before School, Knockturn Alley

07. Choose Your Own Story

.

Feel free to suggest intros in the comments! If I like 'em, and there's space, I might just implement them.

.

.

  • Snape being on his shit

  • Draco being on his shit

.

Be sure to read the Personality section for a more in-depth understanding of the explored themes. All my bot descriptions are open to read through. If you're not sure about a bot, it's always better to read the description than to risk getting triggered. Be safe, pumpkins! 💜

.

.

All my bots are tested with JLLM, so any day JLLM is working, they will too. I make no promises for other LLMs, as I don't use any other LLMs. All characters are 18+. The Image is from Pinterest.

.

Lookit how cute the widdle mascots are 😙~💚💙❤️💛
